Wait, the white block is on the LEFT side of the green base. The green base is at cols 33-35, and the white block is at col 32. The bar is at cols 36-39, which is to the RIGHT of the green base. So the white block is on the opposite side of the bar.

- White block: rows 28-31, col 32

So to eat the bar (which is to the RIGHT of the player), I need to move RIGHT so the white block is on the right side, adjacent to the bar. Then SPACE to expand and eat the bar.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move RIGHT so white block is on right side, adjacent to bar
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print(f"After RIGHT: reward={last_action_result.get('reward', 0)}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Player: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check bar state
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'g':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Bar interior: rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Now SPACE to expand white block RIGHT into the bar
result = action(['SPACE'])
print(f"\nAfter SPACE: reward={last_action_result.get('reward', 0)}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if min(rows) >= 24 and max(rows) <= 40:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check bar state
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'g':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Bar interior: rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
